title: Why the Bombing of Iran Tied the U.S. More Closely to China
summary_full: As the U.S. tries to rebuild its weapons stockpiles drained in the Iran war, it will need access to rare-earth minerals, an industry China dominates.
summary_public: As the U.S. tries to rebuild its weapons stockpiles drained in the Iran war, it will need access to rare-earth minerals, an industry China dominates.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Bombing of Iran Tied the U.S.
